assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to verify current versions, cluster health, node status, and system pods

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 provides the exact gcloud container get-server-config command to check available versions in the Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.3 includes kubectl command to check for deprecated API usage and mentions checking GKE console insights

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Section 2.2 provides the exact gcloud container clusters upgrade command with --master flag and --cluster-version 1.33

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 2.4 includes verification commands with specific expected output showing control plane at 1.33.x-gke.xxx

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Sections 3.2 and 3.6 provide exact gcloud container node-pools upgrade commands for both node pools, though it uses same-level upgrade (1.33) rather than skip-level

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Section 3.3 includes watch command for monitoring node versions and operations list command to check upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook only covers single-step upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33, not sequential upgrades, and doesn't offer skip-level node pool upgrade options

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation covering node versions, pod health, kube-system pods, and application health checks

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes a detailed rollback plan section explaining control plane limitations and node pool rollback procedures with specific commands
